hero.name: Nguyen Thi Dieu Hang
hero.title: Full Stack Developer
hero.tagline: A Software Engineering graduate building web apps end to end — and this site runs an AI right in your browser that can tell you all about me.

about.heading: About
about.body: I am a Software Engineer graduated from HUTECH with hands-on experience in Full Stack Development and a strong foundation in Azure Cloud. I am passionate about building modern, scalable applications that deliver excellent user experiences. I am particularly interested in AI-Driven Development and process automation, and I continuously expand my skills and knowledge to grow into a well-rounded Full Stack Developer.

exp1.desc: Developed web interfaces and integrated APIs. Collaborated with the team on feature development and testing, and gained hands-on experience with system design and backend integration.

exp2.desc: Graduated with an Engineer's Degree in Information Technology.

exp3.desc: Co-founded PlusLearning, an English-learning web & mobile app startup registered as a household business with 4 members. Led UX/UI design and built the app and website with React Native and React.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.empty: No projects to show yet. Tag a repo with the "portfolio" topic on GitHub.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.intro: Have an opportunity or a question? Send me a message and I'll get back to you within 24 hours.
